languages.original_text: "Sister Argenta, your wrath is highly effective in crushing the enemies of the human race. But does it not cloud your judgement? Does it cause you to lose sight of the details that comprise the larger picture of the world?"

languages.text: "Сестра Арджента, ваш гнев очень эффективен для сокрушения врагов рода человеческого. Но не затмевает ли он ваш разум? Не заставляет ли упускать из вида детали, составляющие целостную картину мира?"

"Sister Argenta, your wrath is highly effective in crushing the enemies of the human race. But does it not cloud your judgement? Does it cause you to lose sight of the details that comprise the larger picture of the world?"
languages.original_text: "Сестра Арджента, ваш гнев очень эффективен для сокрушения врагов рода человеческого. Но не затмевает ли он ваш разум? Не заставляет ли упускать из вида детали, составляющие целостную картину мира?"

traits.locale_text: "Sister Argenta, your wrath is highly effective in crushing the enemies of the human race. But does it not cloud your judgement? Does it cause you to lose sight of the details that comprise the larger picture of the world?"

"Sister Argenta, your wrath is highly effective in crushing the enemies of the human race. But does it not cloud your judgement? Does it cause you to lose sight of the details that comprise the larger picture of the world?"

languages.text: «Hermana Argenta, su furia es muy efectiva a la hora de aplastar a los enemigos de la Humanidad, pero ¿no nubla su juicio? ¿No hace que pierda de vista los detalles que forman el panorama completo del mundo?».
languages.original_text: "Sister Argenta, your wrath is highly effective in crushing the enemies of the human race. But does it not cloud your judgement? Does it cause you to lose sight of the details that comprise the larger picture of the world?"

traits.locale_text: «Hermana Argenta, su furia es muy efectiva a la hora de aplastar a los enemigos de la Humanidad, pero ¿no nubla su juicio? ¿No hace que pierda de vista los detalles que forman el panorama completo del mundo?».

languages.text: 「シスター・アルジェンタ、あなたの憤怒は、人類の敵を打ち砕くうえできわめて効果的です。しかし、それはあなたの判断を曇らせはしませんか？ 世界というより大きな全体像を構成する細部を、見失わせてはいませんか？」
languages.original_text: "Sister Argenta, your wrath is highly effective in crushing the enemies of the human race. But does it not cloud your judgement? Does it cause you to lose sight of the details that comprise the larger picture of the world?"

traits.locale_text: 「シスター・アルジェンタ、あなたの憤怒は、人類の敵を打ち砕くうえできわめて効果的です。しかし、それはあなたの判断を曇らせはしませんか？ 世界というより大きな全体像を構成する細部を、見失わせてはいませんか？」

languages.text: “阿洁塔修女，你的愤怒在粉碎人类之敌时极为有效。可它难道不会蒙蔽你的判断吗？不会让你忽略构成世界宏大图景的种种细节吗？”
languages.original_text: "Sister Argenta, your wrath is highly effective in crushing the enemies of the human race. But does it not cloud your judgement? Does it cause you to lose sight of the details that comprise the larger picture of the world?"

traits.locale_text: “阿洁塔修女，你的愤怒在粉碎人类之敌时极为有效。可它难道不会蒙蔽你的判断吗？不会让你忽略构成世界宏大图景的种种细节吗？”

languages.text: "Schwester Argenta, Euer Zorn ist hinsichtlich der Vernichtung der Feinde der Menschheit ausgesprochen effizient. Aber trübt er nicht auch Euer Urteilsvermögen? Verliert Ihr nicht die Details aus den Augen, die ein größeres Bild der Welt ergeben?"
languages.original_text: "Sister Argenta, your wrath is highly effective in crushing the enemies of the human race. But does it not cloud your judgement? Does it cause you to lose sight of the details that comprise the larger picture of the world?"

traits.locale_text: "Schwester Argenta, Euer Zorn ist hinsichtlich der Vernichtung der Feinde der Menschheit ausgesprochen effizient. Aber trübt er nicht auch Euer Urteilsvermögen? Verliert Ihr nicht die Details aus den Augen, die ein größeres Bild der Welt ergeben?"

languages.text: « Sœur Argenta, votre courroux est d'une grande efficacité face aux ennemis de l'humanité. Mais ne nuit-il pas à votre discernement ? Cela ne vous conduit-il pas à ignorer les détails qui composent la grande fresque de l'univers ? »
languages.original_text: "Sister Argenta, your wrath is highly effective in crushing the enemies of the human race. But does it not cloud your judgement? Does it cause you to lose sight of the details that comprise the larger picture of the world?"

traits.locale_text: « Sœur Argenta, votre courroux est d'une grande efficacité face aux ennemis de l'humanité. Mais ne nuit-il pas à votre discernement ? Cela ne vous conduit-il pas à ignorer les détails qui composent la grande fresque de l'univers ? »

languages.text: "Rahibe Argenta, öfkeniz insan ırkının düşmanlarını ezmede oldukça etkili. Fakat bu sizin yargınızı bulandırmıyor mu? Dünyanın daha büyük resmini oluşturan ayrıntıları gözden kaçırmanıza neden olmuyor mu?"
languages.original_text: "Sister Argenta, your wrath is highly effective in crushing the enemies of the human race. But does it not cloud your judgement? Does it cause you to lose sight of the details that comprise the larger picture of the world?"
